title: npamp_00 X25519MLKEM768 KEM-wire KAT
description: Schema for the N-PAMP draft-00 (spec/10 §4; ADR-0005, ML-KEM-first) X25519MLKEM768 KEM-wire Known Answer Test vector. This is a standards-anchored, NON-CIRCULAR KAT: it carries RFC 7748 §6.1 X25519 anchors and NIST ACVP / FIPS 203 ML-KEM-768 anchors plus fixed wire-layout invariants, NOT bytes emitted by an N-PAMP implementation. It pins the hybrid-KEM wire byte order (combiner order) and component encodings.

spec.description: Spec clause this vector pins; must reference N-PAMP draft-00.

kem_codepoint.description: Registered hybrid KEM code point for X25519MLKEM768, hex-prefixed.

provenance.description: Why the vector is non-circular: ML-KEM from NIST ACVP/FIPS 203, X25519 from RFC 7748, none generated by an N-PAMP impl.

purpose.description: What invariant the vector pins (the wire byte order / combiner-order surface, ADR-0005).

mlkem768_keygen.description: Deterministic ML-KEM-768 key generation from the FIPS 203 seed (d, z), NIST ACVP anchored.

d.description: FIPS 203 seed half d (32 bytes, 64 hex chars).

z.description: FIPS 203 seed half z (32 bytes, 64 hex chars).

ek.description: ML-KEM-768 encapsulation key (1184 bytes, 2368 hex chars).

x25519_rfc7748_6_1.description: RFC 7748 §6.1 Curve25519 Diffie-Hellman test vector (raw scalars; crypto/ecdh clamps internally).

alice_private.description: Alice X25519 private scalar (32 bytes, 64 hex chars).

alice_public.description: Alice X25519 public key (32 bytes, 64 hex chars).

bob_private.description: Bob X25519 private scalar (32 bytes, 64 hex chars).

bob_public.description: Bob X25519 public key (32 bytes, 64 hex chars).

shared_secret.description: X25519 ECDH shared secret (32 bytes, 64 hex chars).

mlkem768_decaps_reference.description: NIST ML-KEM-768 encapsulation/decapsulation known-answer: ciphertext c, deterministic encaps randomness m, and shared secret K.

encaps_randomness_m.description: Deterministic ML-KEM encapsulation randomness m (32 bytes, 64 hex chars).

shared_secret_K.description: ML-KEM-768 shared secret K (32 bytes, 64 hex chars).

ciphertext_c.description: ML-KEM-768 ciphertext c (1088 bytes, 2176 hex chars).

wire_layout.description: How a conforming implementation MUST assemble the on-wire fields (ML-KEM-first, ADR-0005) and the fixed component lengths.

kem_share.description: Assembly rule for the KEM share TLV (ek || x25519 public).

kem_ciphertext.description: Assembly rule for the KEM ciphertext TLV (ml-kem ct || x25519 public).

combined_secret.description: Assembly rule for the HKDF-Extract IKM (ml-kem SS || x25519 SS).

coverage.description: Which legs are executable via the Go public API and which carry data-only NIST anchors.

go_public_executable.description: Assertions a Go public-API implementation can reproduce.

not_go_public_executable.description: Legs carried as data-only because the Go public API cannot import an expanded dk.

disconfirmed_candidate.description: A rejected single-source candidate vector and why it must not be used.
